detectors.description:
Reentrancy in FABLE._transfer(address,address,uint256) (FABLE.sol#649-773):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (FABLE.sol#713)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (FABLE.sol#787-799)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (FABLE.sol#719)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount.mul(3).div(5)) (FABLE.sol#815)
		- _developmentAddress.transfer(amount.mul(2).div(5)) (FABLE.sol#817)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (FABLE.sol#771)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (FABLE.sol#937)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (FABLE.sol#917)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (FABLE.sol#919)
	FABLE._rOwned (FABLE.sol#327) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- FABLE._takeTeam(uint256) (FABLE.sol#931-939)
	- FABLE._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (FABLE.sol#891-927)
	- FABLE.balanceOf(address) (FABLE.sol#475-479)
	- FABLE.constructor() (FABLE.sol#409-439)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (FABLE.sol#771)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (FABLE.sol#945)
	FABLE._rTotal (FABLE.sol#339) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- FABLE._getCurrentSupply() (FABLE.sol#1087-1097)
	- FABLE._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (FABLE.sol#943-949)
	- FABLE.constructor() (FABLE.sol#409-439)
	- FABLE.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (FABLE.sol#571-593)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [FABLE._transfer(address,address,uint256)](FABLE.sol#L649-L773):
	External calls:
	- [swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance)](FABLE.sol#L713)
		- [uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp)](FABLE.sol#L787-L799)
	External calls sending eth:
	- [sendETHToFee(address(this).balance)](FABLE.sol#L719)
		- [_marketingAddress.transfer(amount.mul(3).div(5))](FABLE.sol#L815)
		- [_developmentAddress.transfer(amount.mul(2).div(5))](FABLE.sol#L817)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](FABLE.sol#L771)
		- [_rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam)](FABLE.sol#L937)
		- [_rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount)](FABLE.sol#L917)
		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](FABLE.sol#L919)
	[FABLE._rOwned](FABLE.sol#L327) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [FABLE._takeTeam(uint256)](FABLE.sol#L931-L939)
	- [FABLE._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](FABLE.sol#L891-L927)
	- [FABLE.balanceOf(address)](FABLE.sol#L475-L479)
	- [FABLE.constructor()](FABLE.sol#L409-L439)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](FABLE.sol#L771)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](FABLE.sol#L945)
	[FABLE._rTotal](FABLE.sol#L339) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [FABLE._getCurrentSupply()](FABLE.sol#L1087-L1097)
	- [FABLE._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](FABLE.sol#L943-L949)
	- [FABLE.constructor()](FABLE.sol#L409-L439)
	- [FABLE.tokenFromReflection(uint256)](FABLE.sol#L571-L593)

	- _transfer(sender,recipient,amount) (FABLE.sol#547)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount.mul(3).div(5)) (FABLE.sol#815)

		- _allowances[owner][spender] = amount (FABLE.sol#641)
